description.en: Create a new booking on Cal.com for a specific event type and time slot.
description.de: Erstelle eine neue Buchung auf Cal.com für einen bestimmten Ereignistyp und Zeitslot.
description.es: Create a new booking on Cal.com for a specific event type and time slot.
description.fr: Create a new booking on Cal.com for a specific event type and time slot.
description.ro: Create a new booking on Cal.com for a specific event type and time slot.
description.it: Create a new booking on Cal.com for a specific event type and time slot.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Event Type ID

description.en: The ID of the event type to book.
description.de: Die ID des zu buchenden Ereignistyps.
description.es: The ID of the event type to book.
description.fr: The ID of the event type to book.
description.ro: The ID of the event type to book.
description.it: The ID of the event type to book.

inputs.bot: The numeric ID of the Cal.com event type to book. Use the list event types warp to find available IDs.

inputs.name: Start Time

description.en: Start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z').
description.es: Start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z').
description.fr: Start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z').
description.ro: Start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z').
description.it: Start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z').

inputs.bot: The booking start time in ISO 8601 UTC format, e.g. '2024-08-13T09:00:00Z'. Must be an available slot.

inputs.name: Attendee Name
inputs.bot: The full name of the person booking the event.

inputs.name: Attendee Email
inputs.bot: The email address of the person booking the event.

inputs.name: Guests

description.en: Comma-separated list of guest email addresses.
description.de: Kommagetrennte Liste der E-Mail-Adressen der Gäste.
description.es: Comma-separated list of guest email addresses.
description.fr: Comma-separated list of guest email addresses.
description.ro: Comma-separated list of guest email addresses.
description.it: Comma-separated list of guest email addresses.

inputs.bot: Optional comma-separated list of guest email addresses to add to the booking.

inputs.name: Notes

description.en: Additional notes or message for the booking.
description.de: Zusätzliche Notizen oder Nachricht für die Buchung.
description.es: Additional notes or message for the booking.
description.fr: Additional notes or message for the booking.
description.ro: Additional notes or message for the booking.
description.it: Additional notes or message for the booking.

inputs.bot: Optional notes or message to include with the booking.

success.en: Booking created successfully! Booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}, Status: {{BOOKING_STATUS}}
success.es: Booking created successfully! Booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}, Status: {{BOOKING_STATUS}}
success.fr: Booking created successfully! Booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}, Status: {{BOOKING_STATUS}}
success.ro: Booking created successfully! Booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}, Status: {{BOOKING_STATUS}}
success.it: Booking created successfully! Booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}, Status: {{BOOKING_STATUS}}
